name: Eastern School Bus Corp
registry_source: NY DOS - direct entity record not retrieved
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found via name keyword searches (EASTERN SCHOOL BUS / EASTERN SCHOOL BUS CORP / EASTERN SCHOOL / EASTERN SCHOOLBUS all returned 'no records'); likely an intrastate-only NY school bus operator that does not require a USDOT number (NY school bus contractors regulated primarily under NYSDOT Article 19-A rather than federal FMCSA). Business directory listings (Yelp/Yellow Pages) confirm Eastern School Bus Corporation at 19411 Northern Blvd, Flushing, NY 11358, phone (718) 357-0550, '28 years in business' (implying founding ~1998). NY Department of State direct entity search (apps.dos.ny.gov) returned connection errors during automated lookup - manual verification recommended. Do not confuse with Eastern Bus Company Inc (USDOT 895273), Eastern Bus Service Inc (USDOT 2259376, 132-59 Maple Ave Flushing), or Eastern Union Transportation Inc (USDOT 4042543) - none of those match this entity's address.

notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found via keyword searches (STEVES SCHOOL BUS / STEVE'S SCHOOL BUS / STEVES SCHOOL BUS SERVICE / STEVE'S SCHOOL BUS SVC all returned 'no records'). The Steve's School Bus And Van Service (USDOT 2029185) is in Morrisville NC; Steve's School Bus Service Inc (BBB profile) is in Lyndeborough NH - neither matches Waverly, GA. Address 2052 Dover Bluff Rd, Waverly, GA 31565 currently associated with a Mobil/Friendly Express gas station per multiple directory sources - suggests the school bus operation at this address may no longer exist at that location or address in source data may be a registered-agent/mailing address rather than operating yard. GA Secretary of State direct entity search (ecorp.sos.ga.gov) returned 403 during automated lookup - manual verification recommended. Likely a very small intrastate operator (Brantley/Camden County area) below federal USDOT thresholds.

name: KBR Inc Which Will Do Bus
registry_source: NY DOS - direct entity record not retrieved
notes: Name 'KBR Inc Which Will Do Bus' appears to be a TRUNCATED NY corporate name fragment, typical of 'KBR Inc Which Will Do Business In NY As [DBA]' construction used when a Delaware/foreign corp registers in NY with a name conflict. FMCSA SAFER name searches returned only KBR INC entries in Washington MI (USDOT 1904175) and Lexington Park MD (USDOT 379709) - neither in Rochester NY. KBR-Transportation Services Inc (USDOT 3579401) is freight in Granite City IL, not school bus. The KBR Inc entity registered with NY DOS at opengovny is KBR Fulfillment Inc in Ronkonkoma NY (Long Island) - not Rochester. Address 1269 Bri Hen Townline Rd (Brighton-Henrietta Town Line Rd), Rochester, NY 14623 is a commercial corridor (nearby tenants include New York Bus Sales at 1177, MWI Inc Empire Division). Likely a small intrastate NY school bus operator not appearing in federal FMCSA system - no USDOT could be confidently associated. Manual NY DOS lookup recommended given name truncation.
